title: centrostachys velutina
intro: Centrostachys velutina, also known as the 'velvet centostachys', is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centrostachys velutina include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the management of various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Centrostachys velutina are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
